name: Insight Molecular Diagnostics Inc.
business: Insight Molecular Diagnostics Inc. develops and commercializes molecular diagnostic tests for transplant organ rejection monitoring, including laboratory developed tests (LDTs), research use only (RUO) kits, and in vitro diagnostic (IVD) kits. Its primary focus is the GraftAssure family of assays for donor-derived cell-free DNA (dd-cfDNA) quantification. The company also has oncology assays but does not intend to commercialize them in the next 12 months.

exposures.sentence: We are a pioneering diagnostics technology company. Our mission is to expand access to novel molecular diagnostic testing, most immediately in the transplanted organ rejection testing category.

catalysts.event: Submitted data package to FDA seeking marketing authorization for GraftAssureDx
catalysts.sentence: On March 25, 2026, we submitted a data package to the FDA seeking marketing authorization for GraftAssureDx, which is the kitted version of our transplanted organ rejection monitoring assay.

catalysts.event: First sale of GraftAssureIQ kits to a research laboratory customer
catalysts.sentence: In May 2025, we sold our first GraftAssureIQ kits to a research laboratory customer (see Note 2, Revenue Recognition Kitted Products, to our consolidated financial statements included elsewhere in this Report for additional information).

catalysts.event: Entered into Specimen Collection Agreement with a national reference lab provider
catalysts.sentence: On February 20, 2026, we entered into a Specimen Collection Agreement with a national reference lab provider.
In 2025, we started a clinical trial in conjunction with our IVD submission for GraftAssureDx.
On July 15, 2025, we were awarded U.S. Patent No. 12,359,252, which covers our method for detecting and treating colorectal cancer using circulating nucleic acid biomarkers.

catalysts.event: February 2025 Offering raised approximately $29.1 million gross proceeds
catalysts.sentence: On February 10, 2025, we consummated a private placement of our securities to certain accredited investors for the issuance and sale of 7,536,706 shares of our common stock and pre-funded warrants to purchase 3,069,926 shares of our common stock, with an exercise price of $0.0001 per share (the February 2025 Offering).

catalysts.event: February 2026 Offering raised approximately $26.0 million gross proceeds
catalysts.sentence: On February 12, 2026, we consummated a registered direct offering of our securities to certain investors for the issuance and sale of 3,482,498 shares of our common stock and pre-funded warrants to purchase 1,043,478 shares of our common stock, with an exercise price of $0.0001 per share (the February 2026 Offering).

tamClaims.claim: Roughly $2 billion addressable market for kitted transplant rejection testing
tamClaims.sentence: We expect that enabling in-house testing will deliver new value in the roughly $2 billion addressable market for kitted transplant rejection testing.
